scene_title: La mano sulla sabbia — il momento prima della scoperta
narrative_role: Atto III, setup del WOW 3. La tensione cresce.

prompt_components.subject: a single weathered hand sweeping away white fine sand with two fingers
prompt_components.action: the fingers move slowly, gently, brushing the sand aside; gradually a curved metallic edge becomes visible — the outline of something round and metallic just below the surface; the hand pauses on revealing it
prompt_components.environment: macro framing on white beach sand grains, soft daylight, depth of field very shallow with background completely out of focus
prompt_components.camera_movement: completely static macro shot, no camera movement, only the hand moves
prompt_components.lighting: natural midday with soft warm tint, intimate and quiet
prompt_components.mood: anticipatory, sacred, the moment before revelation — like an archaeologist finding something profound
prompt_components.audio_hint: very soft sand granular shifting sound, barely audible, then near silence as the metallic edge appears, a single distant ethereal bell chime faintly in atmosphere

acceptance_criteria: Sand grains visibili come dettaglio macro
Il bordo metallico appare ma NON si accende ancora (succede in 08A)
